title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Babyoye - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Babyoye - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Babyoye. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Babyoye:
Babyoye is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye!
